headline: Northrop Grumman Just Hiked Its Dividend, But Its Stock Has Tanked - Time to Buy NOC?
summary: Northrop Grumman Corp hiked its annual dividend rate by about 7%. But NOC stock is down 26% from its peak and well below its average historical yield. Value investors are also shorting out-of-the-money puts.

headline: Defense spending, China in Asia and lessons from Ukraine: Takeways from the 2026 IISS Shangri-La Dialogue
summary: The summit sees top world leaders, defence officials and key executives gathering in Singapore from May 29 to 31
